Source URL: https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance

# SBDC Resource Partner Process Overview

## What an SBDC is in the BOSS ecosystem
Small Business Development Centers are SBA resource partners that provide local business counseling/advising and training. In the Houston region, the UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network is the main network reviewed in this pack.

## Standard SBDC process
1. User identifies their location and business need.
2. User finds the local SBDC by ZIP/county/service area.
3. New user completes the SBDC intake/registration process.
4. SBDC schedules virtual or in-person advising.
5. Advisor helps with planning, market research, financing preparation, management, marketing, training, and local ecosystem navigation.
6. Advisor may refer the user to a business specialist, APEX, International Trade Center, Technology Commercialization, training events, webinars, or external professionals.

## BOSS guardrail
Do not present SBDC as a lender, law firm, CPA, certification authority, or guarantee of funding. Present it as no-cost business advising/training and a route to local support.
